star_1.text: This game has gone downhill. When I first played it, it was simple. But they've changed the game so much for worse. The use of Generated Imagery, Too much UI obscuring the screen, and the tedious grinding to get new cars and the greedy ways this game tries to earn money. Don't waste your money, Nor your time, it is not worth it. Please return the game to its roots where it first started, this isn't fun.

The only thing this games makes you want to get away from is the endless ads. If you want to buy a car, get upgrades, or even restart the level: You have to watch an ad. The gameplay is fun, but that is when you actually get to play the game (which is rare with all the ads). You cannot progress, save, or do anything without ads. For anyone who is reading reviews to potentially download the game: I HIGHLY recommend you do NOT download this game that is closer to a glorified advertisement viewer.

A few years ago I reviewed this game at 4/5 stars. It was a good game, the grind wasn't bad, car selection was nice, microtransactions weren't in your face and it was a great game. Now the game has been ruined. The developers have added no new content. The game is riddled with microtransactions. The devs have used AI slop for their marketing and images. 1 spin costs 10x more than it used to. I'm really disappointed and cannot recommend this game anymore. Do better MiniClip/PixelBite.
Latest update sucks. Showing ads while playing the game, during driving. Also no new cars, have to pay 108rs for every car. Waste of money and time. 0 out of 5.
Forced ads, I play the game for less then 15 seconds and got a forced ad. I'm uninstalling......

this was genuinely a good game u til 2 years ago when they decided to restart updating it. There's to many ads, to buy a car it costs 1000 coins (before it was 100) they added an unnecessary health bar. They lowkeygenuinely ruined the game. you should NOT install this game.

Decent game, I can't unlock my last two cars. I've been at the car dealership for four hours and haven't unlocked either of the two cars. It's annoying that you can unlock duplicates. This needs to be fixed.

this game was super fun until this new update, now every time you turn, you risk watching an ad because of bad placement. A new problem as of November 27, my FPS drops to Google slideshow speeds when I start a game, while bigger and more complex games still run perfectly fine.
Paid to get rid of ads. Still got ads.

Gameplay is amazing but there are huge problems which makes the game unplayable, for example you can't make progress: I played for 1 hour and opened 3 cars, when I came after 5 hours everything was gone, cars, quests I completed and money too. And this is why I unloaded, it's just a waste of time,you need to earn money at game for cars which you will loose all after you quit. Sorry but 1 star
i liked the old version of the game better, u only needed 100 coins to buy a car but now u need 1000, for one car btw

Wretched Camera angles. Obnoxious helicopter that can shoot you through buildings which is a sign of laziness. The police need to be nerfed. 3 second timer is just a jerk move for money. The latest update is trash: the vehicles are now overly sensored, Building obstructing views is now obscene, vehicle upgrades and the speed now make it where you have to spend money. This is now a stress inducing game that capitalism and ego wrecked. This is another review that has been ignored=one star.

Honestly, you should add more ads. I’m still, somehow, accidentally managing to play the game between them, can’t let that happen. Please maximize the ad-to-game ratio for the ultimate premium experience.

I've played this game since 2021. I loved it so much! But, the recent updates destroyed the game. The new interface looks so bad, so cheap, and ugly. Coins are harder to get, and it's kinda boring tbh. The fun doesn't come from the harder it gets to earn coins, the fun comes from new cars, maps, mechanics, etc. Changing the interface or making the progress so much harder is a really bad move from you guys...
I used to love this game and been playing it for the past few years. But now the creators have ruind it in anyway they can and continue going it.
used to be cool but now it can't even steal my data fast enough to load the bloody game. ads everywhere, huge incentive to buy. Data harvesting paid hot trash. so sad.

When I first played this game in 2025, the performance was terrible. My phone, which is still quite good for gaming this year, lagged, even though it had a Helio G99 chipset. And the font in the game is really ugly. It looks like a child's handwriting. I hope the developers can change the font back to its original form and optimize the game.

Awful ad infested game. I wanted to play the original Reckless Getaway from 2011 but I could only find this terrible sequel with worse graphics and constant ad pop ups. Even after paying £4.49 to remove them, there are still so many ads in the game!! Such a rip off, uninstalled.

It used to be really good about a year or two ago but they've started adding menu, icons, HUD, and even loading screen updates. It used to be a really good alternative to smashy road but now they've changed everything great about the game and started making paid for content aswell, which would be fine if the game wasn't completely changed and if the paid content was a large amount for what you're paying, $15 is extremely greedy for a map and a few cars. I'm sad the game I once loved is gone. :'(

edit3:ok nvm this game is really bad I thought is gonna be fun but sometimes for some reason my button won't work idk why I try on my other devices still work but this device didn't work I guess this game is not that recommended I'm sorry I thought it's good and sometimes my screen gets blurry pls remove that bru

star_2.text: The game is fun and addictive I'll give it that. The game tries too hard to be as difficult as possible. There's different levels of difficulty and with this game is turned all the way up. A lot of the ramp jumps attempted, collecting coins, object avoidance, head-on collisions, air strikes where there shouldn't be any.There's difficult and then there's ridiculous. The uninstalling Factor though was when yesterday my garage had over 40 cars and today it has one.

This game was fun for months, but then they changed the car price to 1000, and i am missing only a few cars, so it takes forever to reroll to get the car i need. This game has really gone downhill. The way to fix it would be to remove some ads, and make it so every time I buy a car, it's one I don't have. also, please get rid of ads inside of runs, like for power ups. thanks, and devs pls change this to make it so i dont have to spend 3 hrs rerolling. (happened once)

This game is pretty fun, basically Smashy Road without being Smashy Road. I've been playing this game for years, and recently there have been some bad changes. Too many things require you to watch an ad, and coins only appear in these annoying lines now. I also spent actual money to unlock the space themed map, and I can't even drive one of the few included cars after randomly unlocking the other included cars. Update edit: do not upgrade cars, it was poorly done and unbalances gameplay.

Back when Pixelbite maintained this game. it was a fun, original and endlessly enjoyable five star game. Now, after Miniclip took over development, the game got ridden with advertisements, bloat and retention features that took away the indie feel of the game. It isn't even bearable to play anymore - there is so much bloat the game now refuses to hit 15/20 frames at any point in time on my flagship, making it near unplayable!

I've been playing this game for a long time. many years. new update has finally ruined it with ads. i didn't mind ads at the end of a run but ads mid-run are unacceptable. it ruins the game. sad, 😢 but uninstalled.

this game was very good but first some reason it has been veryyyyy buggeddd lately u cant win any car and u can't change maps it has been so annoying I tried deleting account and installing app again too but nothing worked

I got to play and it was good but one issue the role for a car isn't working and I tried so many methods 😭 but still non of them is working I hate to give two star but it,s unfare to all of us grafics is alr also the game play is good too but there,s so many bugs each year . . . like one time you didn't save my game progress like are you serious? I would be praying to save the game but nope soo fix it and get another bug hahaha ✓:)

it's okay,it was a good game just every time I had the money to buy a mystery car for one thousand and it glitched showing that there's no car and returned back to the game's title (sorry bad English but you know what I mean)

The game itself is good (4 stars). However, there is a severe problem with ads. There is the option to play with wifi off, but almost no rewards will be granted from missions. Generally the idea is pretty good but the game's environment makes it one of the worst experiences a mobile game provides. (By "environment" I mean the menu and such, not the actual gameplay)
the poster or the ad of the game is not what we find in the game...and that is more painful to experience after downloading a game

I rated this game 5 stars 3 years ago and decided to download it again. The physics and gameplay look the same which is super fun, but it looks like they added paid content in the game and it is so much money for so little stuff. However the biggest issue is after each round you have to watch an ad. It gets sooo annoying after some time. The sad part is, I know this review will just fly past their head. But yeah the gameplay is fine, the ui is changed and looks extremely weird, has so much ads.
Fun game but too many ads. I would pay for an ad free version. or a low ad version even. I spend more time in ads than in the game itself.
the game is good but when we try to get a new car we keep getting the same car again and again and again

More frustrating than fun. Has excellent graphics and physics like other Reckless games. But there is so much going on all at once it's hard to figure out what to do. A short tutorial would be helpful. Also, not enough items. By the time I find them I'm almost dead. Plus there is no getaway. Even if you complete a challenge you keep going until you die, would be nice to actually getaway.

Game doesnt save progress,the gambling system is bad and the quest for each cars doesnt have more information like the tank challenge(i dont know how to do it i even survive until 600 and tanks wont show up),the ads are like zombies they keep coming one after another. This doesnt deserve a 2-star,even 2-star games is better than this but the grapics is cool , ill rate 9/10 the other stuff is cool and developers please add other control settings and fix all my problems and others too.

Interesting game, decent graphics. I've enjoyed games by Miniclip for many years. Unfortunately I won't be playing this game no more. Tried it for 15 minutes and found it very hard and the ads were so annoying. Want coins? Watch an ad. Want to play a game? Watch an ad. 60 second of enjoyment and have to watch a bunch of ads each time. Not amused. Will no longer play any of your games.

No, you don't get to select a map you want to drive on, each car has their own place to drive. Unfortunately, it's incredibly flawed as some challenges become impossible. Plus, if you flip over, you have 2 seconds to get yourself up, or the game automatically "busts" you. Rigged and smashyroad is better.

this game is awesome. but after each crash stupid adds an some of them try to force you to download when your hitting the x a hundred times an keeps going to the install game mode really gets annoying. I know I could pay but I'm having problems on my end with that. I would give 5 stars if adds would just pop up like every 20 min. but ppl to money hungry for that when they r making a killing from advertising.

Very good game and very entertaining on me (before), but now, I don't like it anymore, do you know the reason? I was playing this for a few minutes and I got 1000 coins, but after I abort out on the game and when I came back, the game did not save, I was so mad about it, + fix that PAcKiNg PROBLEM!

I like this game a lot but I have deducted 3 stars because: 1) After every gameplay there is one ad which lasts about 40 second and even if I click cross on the right hand corner it goes to Google playstore. 2) If we play this game without turning the internet or wifi on then the progress is not saved, all the coins and cars collected in this period is lost.

star_3.text: this game is decent. it's an ad after pretty much every level though. my biggest complaint is that since I've unlocked roughly a third of the cars, every time I try to get more I have to re-roll 5+ times because I keep unlocking different cars. for ads. it's annoying. I'm fine re-spinning once, maybe twice, but by the 4th time, I'd rather close the game then keep spinning

Excellent concept with great potential. I love the run from the police concept, but I am disappointed about the upgrades, levels, achievements as they do not enhance gameplay. The controls are pretty painful and cumbersome. Your car will damage quickly and wreck within the first minute. Get different a different car doesn't help! None of the cars stay straight despite the type of cars that you can easily get because the coins are given so freely. Keep working on this!

It's a cool game. Good time waster. But some of the challenges are set to fail... It will give you a courier challenge and you somehow manage to survive for 5 minutes driving all around the city and not find a single suit case to start the challenge. But you'll find plenty of robbery challenges. And vice versa. Or you'll have a burning challenge and your car will start smoking and wreck without ever burning

This game WAS Great. I remember maybe 4 odd years ago I really enjoyed this game. But Today its riddled with those Accidental [Free Power UP] Ad Buttons in the middle of Gameplay REALLY Irritating. Also WHY IS THERE AI IMAGES IT LOOKS TRASHY AND GHETTO!!! It makes the Game look bad. The AI App Icon looks trash and so does that horrible Loading Screen. Don't get me wrong the core game is there. I like the Gameplay I hate how they go about making money on it. It. is. Scummy.

Good game. More room for improvement though. I think there should be a map telling us where to go. Also, we should have a destination to get to and stop. There should probably be like a story behind the chase. We should not be driving blind. We should have a way to escape the police. After all, that seems to be the goal of the game. I would like for the changes to be effected anytime soon. I really like the game and I wouldn't want to stop playing because it got boring. l

Best police game i've ever played but why did they add upgrades for the vehicles in Getaway 2, it just makes the game more boring, because your spending more time on upgrading the cars then playing the actual game itself!!!

It's a very good game, easy five stars, wouldn't there he one flaw getting the cars. You get money very slow ( if you do not want to watch ads). With the money you can win a car. But you can win cars you already have, meaning the money is gone. This makes it extremely frustrating to progress. You save for money only to get nothing over and over.

The game aren't that bad. But the graphics is good. I've been playing it for long and it seems to amaze me, but I wanna ask for something new.... Like All the cars should be fast I don't know if there's a way in which the my can can do drifting And if I keep going driving and going straight it seems like I've in the same high way before. So the cities are becoming more of a circle. Please make some updates
New update ruined the interface on gameplay screen. All powerups in the middle of the screen plus the health bar could be moved to a corner too, not above the vehicle.

I think that this game is impressively cool, and the design of the graphics is in my favourite style. Only one complain; since the update where the game was giving ads for gold and power-ups at the start of the games, the progress after turning off WIFI resets since that update. For example, I won a MONSTER TRUCK, and it dissapeared the next time I went into the day... P

The game is extreme fun but the new ui, ai generated icon,new loading screen, micro transaction prompts, new swat truck designs and constant ads are ANNOYING. I also don't like it that now the game requires internet connection to play as now I cannot enjoy it while away from home. Please bring back the old version or at least bring it back as a separate game. I used to prefer this over smashy road but now it's the opposite way round. 3/5 Please bring the og RG2 back.

There's quite a lot of ads, and know the update adds upgrades? I tried them and saw no difference, and now its feel like a sell out, I enjoyed it because it didn't ask for anything but to enjoy the game but now you have offers and health that needs an ad to actually work and you can just watch an ad to start up with a power up. But it's still a fun game.

The game can be fun, but has moments where it can be frustrating. Sometimes police vehicles spawn right in front of you, doing tons of damage. some challenges don't match up with their vehicles, one example was a fast car needed to catch collectable crowns, but wasn't able to due to the fact that the car was too fast for the ramp it needed to jump off of. Finally when you buy a roll for a new vehicle, you get duplicates, and the game gives you nothing for it.. as usual premium option is pricey

Game definitely has potential but needs the edges smoothed down. Definitely need a gas pedal at minimum added to the controls. Only having control of left and right steering is kinda ridiculous. Some of the missions aren't clear at all, as well as the challenges that are timed are timed way too short. And some things you can crash and go through but others you can't kinda sucks too, mainly cause it's the same thing. Like fences and bushes.

This is one of those games that you can put your time into! But, it's frustrating that I have no idea how to save my progress before logging out, bc every time I log in the game my progress resets. A fix or improvement can make this game much more engaging. Atleast consider.

It's a fun good I played it with without add's and I used to have a subscription on the Google Play store but otherwise it's just kinda grindy and it's hard to do some of the challenges to get all 3 challenges done on a vehicle and if you're playing with add's you probably have one at the start of every game and when you die or start the next one which is okay I guess but when it gets grindy it's hard to want to keep playing with the repeated add's basically single couple minutes.

I used to love this app. About 2 weeks ago I got stuck in an endless loop. No free presents, same cars every time even if I hit the random button. I tried deleting and reinstalling the game but it didn't work. Also most of the time the shadows are off but when they turn on it gets really slow and it lags. Another thing. If I play the game for too long the controls start breaking and it makes it to hard to do anything. I can't turn or back up without hitting everything. Please fix this soon.

This game is great and all and the mechanics are fine but the problem is whenever I get to play this and log off a moment ago the cars and money I acquired was gone like literally GONE. I started again on scraps as usual and after I logged off the game or turn in off the money and missions and lastly the cars are gone again like nothing happened like I just like started playing for the first time. I hope this bug get fixed whatsoever but the game it's self is pretty good

The game is nice, good controls and very few ads (you can always watch ads to get more money for example). The MOST ANNOYING thing though is that you don't see the progress of the challenge. For example the challenge "survive for a certain amount of time/destruction": how much? 1m, 2m, 5m, 8m, 4h, 2d?? 100 damage points? 200dp, 300dp? Put a progress bar in game or specify better how much time/destruction.

I've come to an error in the game now. When they updated the Privacy Policy and whatever, my progress keeps on reseting. Whenever I log into the game, it keeps telling me I must Accept, and I do. Then when I go out and start playing the game again I'm back to the Policy Accept screen and all my progress from my previous getaways gets reset then I lose all my cars that I got. Please fix because now I'm stuck in a loop!!!

star_4.text: As someone who played this game for years, unlocked every car (including DLC) (Excluding the 2 special mystery cars unable to be unlocked by unlocking all cars in a map,) and got all cars max level with all challenges completed, this game is great. Gameplay if fun, a challenge, and lots of replay value with bunch of maps and lots of cars. Some criticisms i have is the amount of ads you get with regular gameplay and a hard time unlocking cars as you get so much duplicates. Great game 4/5.

I personally think that the game was very fun, with many different vehicles with many different stats. the only letdown was that you would get an ad EVERY FIVE MINUTES. Also, if you roll and get a vehicle you already have, YOU HAVE TO watch an ad to reroll for what is hopefully a different vehicle or spend more coins! All things considered, it's a great game. There are just too many ads, though.

An amazing game! It is really fun and the cars are designed well, and the ai cops are stupid, but smart enough to not make the game boring. The graphics are good, and the overall game is fun. The only complaints I have are that they raised the win car price to 1000 coins, and they haven't fixed it where the cars already owned aren't taken out. The most major problem I have is that everytime you die, before you start a new game, there is an ad. Put one every other game.

This is my 100% honest review, and I must start by saying I really do love this game a lot. The controls are nice, I like the auto gas idea as it adds to the challenge, I like the different vehicles you can get and the maps are cool, especially the farm. Ive completed nearly every challenge decently well and with practice... Except the flaming bike... Thats too hard imo. My one main issue is the car buying system... Did 50 draws and got zero new cars... So much time wasted. Overall good game!

REALLY fun gameplay, but there are nevertheless some problems. One being, if you get a duplicate vehicle, you have to watch an ad. I watched an ad, and guess what? ANOTHER duplicate vehicle! What the heck? Can the devs please allow us to get free rerolls? Still, I would recommend playing this game because you can turn off the Internet to remove the forced ads (Kudos to the devs for that 😃), so it's a fun time waster for the road.

This game is incredibly fun!! The only thing that gets me is trying to do survival challenges. They seem to hit you hard with just about the hardest enemies by the time you're halways through the challenge? Maybe a free roam mode for practice? A better time interval? If it's skill based and the more you crash/take damage the faster that happens I would add a hint to that somewhere at least so players are aware.

The game is really fun and challenging at the same time. I like the destructive aspect of it and it works well to let some steam off. The only thing I would like to see is more ways to spend the coins. Thanks to Google PlayPass, I have unlocked 95%of the vehicles so I really have no use for the coins now. It would be nice if we could buy powerups with the coins that you normally get from getting the purple question marks when playing the game. Overall fun game though.

Hey, Pixelbite. Big fan of the game. It's really fun and has some very wacky and out there vehicles in it, so thanks for making this game. Suggestion: can you take the reference cars from other games and pieces of pop culture, such as the Spirit Chaser, Bobtail Truck, and Sausage Mobile, into their own category? This is so us, the players, and you, the dev team, can have the reference vehicles in one place. Also, can we have an A-Team van, the General Lee, and Blues Brothers car? Pls and thx.

I love the game it's similar to GTA but the reason why I'm giving 4 stars is because after about 15 minutes of game play it overheats my new phone. I'm not sure why it's overheating my device because it doesn't use a lot of battery but if you fix the problem I'll up it to 5 stars.

It's good but if the added breaking news and traffic jam and some people and go around the world's and need a passport to go to different places and even countries and cities and even rockets to beat the game but you have to have two thousand dollars then that will be a fully 5 stars

tldr: Fun from jump. Haven't played long but instant new fav. style is classic cool, gameplay is simple The game asked for a review after the first play thru so I thought sense it was a min of enjoyment that I will go ahead and share my exp. After playing 1 round and getting a new car I have so far had a good time. Genuinely fun, you get stick it to 12 which is well deserved, and the style is classic polygon cool. Can't say much more since haven't played long enough but i am impressed so far.

Very good game, fun gameplay but the new update it just isnt it, the new health bar, wanted level, power-ups with ads. I used to grind this game so much I love it but please remove or make a new update, just make the game like it used to.
I think there is a bug where i couldn't win car and I tired multiple time but I didn't get new car PLEASE 🥺🥺 fix Fast

I like this game very much but I have problem with the controls I like car games with steering control this game lacks that option. it would be more fun if u add steering control(in my opinion).This is the reason I'm giving 4 stars

Despite being difficult in some areas, it's still very fun! I do have some suggestions/requests, though. Can you make it so after a certain amount of points, the game pauses or slows down and you can pick an upgrade for your car, to survive longer? Can you also add maybe a sandbox mode, where you're invincible, with an option to turn cop car on or off? These are features that I'd really like to see, plus maybe a movie stuntman thing, too, like in Stuntman Ignition, lol. Great game, overall.

Game experience so far is very good. Am still early on in game and am still learning but so far I'm very impressed. Large selection of vehicles that can be acquired through watching a few ads all at your own pace and challenges take more than a couple of attempts to complete, which is what we want. Over all, first impressions are very well put together game. Not 5 stars coz am still early on in the game. Maybe change later.

The game graphics and gameplays are good, but each time I play the game, quit then come back to continue playing. It doesn't usually saves or continue from the last memory which is very bad. You guys should improve on that. And also add exciting weapons like grenades, guns and new vehicles. Anyways, I'll give the game 4 star ⭐.
the swat do a little too much damage but other then that it's fun

This game is amazing. I liked the new update , but there are some problems. Like the green plus power up that does absolutely nothing. Sometimes progress doesn't even save unless you have wifi. And buying new cars is really annoying because you get duplicates really often. Other than that the game is awesome. It would be really cool if some cars could have special abilities. And I hoped the wedge car could actually wedge under other cars...
An extra addition for free world without cops would make it an amazing game to play

star_5.text: If I could, I would leave a 4.5 star review. I love this game, but there are a few changes that I would recommend to improve this game. Most of the time I find myself repeatedly buying vehicles I already have and to get a free reroll I have to watch an add. In the last update, the vehicle menu layout was changed. I personally liked the old one better, it was easier and faster to find vehicles in the previous menu. But besides that, thank you to the developers for such a great game!

Cool concept, the abilities definitely hit the spot all around. Vehicle unlocking system seems reliable. No errors of the bat; being a newer player. Overall for what it is, Highly recommended if you like this style of game. One of those games that gives childhood videogame nostalgia in most every way. 9-10. Not 10-10 due to lack of customization in general, A level editor and control over police pursuit and abilities on map, color and maybe unlockables for cars, would be a dream for this game.

Very fun. 84 different cars to collect, ranging from combine harvesters to sedans, this game has literally everything. Very easy to control, the maps are really well put together and the cars chasing you are really interesting, like cop cars and SWAT vehicles, tanks and hummers. You can collect power-ups, one is an explosion that knocks back every car around you, one is a mode where you are invincible and break everything you hit, and the last is jump boost. There are challenges, too.

I think the game a great time killer and super fun, but I have an idea, if you guys from pixelbite see this, I think it would be cool if you added a PvP mode, where you have to destroy each others car, another idea I have, is if you have a duo or more players that all run away from the cops, and that you can sabotage each other in the process. LOVE the game tho :))

So fun and satify to drive around like a maniac. Simple drive like crazy while trying to dodge the cops. You can collect coins and mission to get more money to get more cars to get more maps and the maps unlock more posibility to do things in them. You can aswell get powers witch can help you in need. Catchy "I'm on the run" music is amazing . I suggest putting the game down once your board, you get more burned out by doing it. After a while play it to get refreshed on it.

hey I love this game It adds a tough challenge and I love the army Chase's it's the hardest but funniest and I think what would make this game better if you added a full free roam map that would make the game alot better so that way you don't have to switch cars to be on a different location anyways still love the game so keep up the good work 🥳😂🤣😂🤣😅
best poly car game i ever played in my life. all thing in this game is great. but i think it will be great if you add a map(navigation thingy) so players can drive by seeing it.

i remember back in 2022 I used to play this the thing I hated is that you can get duplicates over and over again and you used to only need 100 coins NOW YOU NEEEEED A 1000 COINS what the heck pls add a multiplayer version where someone is a cop and the other one is a Getaway driver
Very fun game ! don't blame the ads, without them, we couldn't play this masterpiece!!!
great game and it would be cool if you could connect trailers with some trucks for 50 seconds and undercover cops would be cool

l love the game but please add humans inside the game and please make the airplane more visible and put texture of the car and please add military tanks inside the game to make it difficult for player's and add building's that car can enter without any problem and please add driver's to drive those car thanks for your time l hope your able to do what is expected
This is a lovely game with simple mechanics. I love the thrill it gives when being chased by the police
Great game, the chaos is really good. Once you get a feel of the mechanics of the game and your skills get better, the pleasure doubles. Edit: If you could add an offline LAN mode it'll be very nice.
great game works great on Chromebooks and phones. It is playable offline but you can't buy cars or if it does you just get one that you already bought

This is the best game I have downloaded on my phone. 1. The soundtracks are absolute bangers, especially the arabic music and the default. 2. The game is very addicting and has tons of content, including cars, maps and challenges. 3. The controls are simple and the gameplay is packed with action, explosions and endless fun. If you're looking for an endless car game, this is it.

Been playing this game 4 years now and I think it's time I gave it the review it deserves. It's awesome, while it's concept is simple. You drive a car while trying to run from the cops, a tried and true formula yet, I've never seen a game as perfect as this. No cheap/expensive vehicles (100 coins for a random car), quests for every one of them and simple (but great) maps. I don't know if there are plans to add more vehicles/maps but to me there's nothing missing. Congratulations to the devs.

Great game to play when bored. The ads have been kept to a minimum, and the game is just truly fun to play. 5 stars are deserved. I have some suggestions though, maybe the red barrels could leak fuel when hit, and if the car is on fire, it ignites when run over or car upgrades could be done. Again, these are just suggestions, but other than that, it's an amazing game.

Came back after seeing too many newer games. Update looks dope, almost like it was Crash of Cars but you upgrade the cars with coins. Oh well, it's still good and Miniclip kept this one neat and simple
this is so peak ,it gives need for speed most wanted vibes fully . i will suggest you to play it iam addicted already.

It's a very fun and excellent car chase game. The police aren't OP when it comes on to chasing you, very easy to escape the police in a few seconds and very realistic maps and cars. Would be a great competitor for PAKO 2 and Smashy Roads 2. There are some things I would like to see in the game though. How about mystery marks that let you repair your car if damaged, or controllable items on vehicles, for example, you can shoot the police with the gun on the Conflict Truck. Keep up the good work!
